name: Shrimp Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound medium shrimp, peeled, washed, deveined, sliced in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the shrimp in the marinade for about 10 minutes.
2. Stir fry the cooked shrimp with the sauce until well coated, about 5 minutes.
3. Add vegetables and mix everything together.
4. Turn off the heat.
